---
name: Pre-discussed or maintainer-authored issue
about: For issues already approved in GitHub Discussions, or issues opened by maintainers.
---

Please do not use this template to start a new bug report, feature request, suggestion, or question.

This template is only for issues that meet one of these criteria:

- A maintainer asked you to open an issue after a GitHub Discussion.
- You are a maintainer opening an issue to track planned work.

If that does not apply, please start in GitHub Discussions instead:
https://github.com/irbis-sh/zen-desktop/discussions/new/choose
